portfolios.headline: Crafting the software you need in minutes
portfolios.heroText: I'm 15 years old as of 2026, born on 7th Nov' 2010, I build real world applications in minutes, all those applications just the way you want.
portfolios.shippingDescription: Portfolio generator you may have never seen, it's free, and builds just what you want, simple and easy to do. You can easily change the look and feel of your portfolio for a staggering affordable price of roughly $3 a month!

aboutCards.title: AI + Vibe Coding
aboutCards.description: I used to write codes my self and some of my projects would take months, but with the help of Vibe Coding, I can achieve anything in minutes.

aboutCards.title: Tennis Player
aboutCards.description: Not to mention, I am a professional tennis player, currently my goal is TOP 50 in nationals, India.

aboutCards.title: YouTuber
aboutCards.description: I also spend time making videos, and getting some attention.

aboutCards.title: Guitar
aboutCards.description: PC closed, off the court, you'd definitely see me with a guitar in hand.

projects.title: 25 Carat Wealth
projects.description: I made a website for my dad, he's a financial planner, and he wanted a website for his business, so I made one for him, go check it out at "25caratwealth.com".

projects.title: Enriching Wealth
projects.description: I also made another website for my dad's client, he's also in the same business as my dad and wanted a website, so I did it again, make sure to check it out at "enrichingwealth.com".

projects.title: Portfolio-Atharv
projects.description: I have made my own portfolio, you are literally on this page and this is my portfolio.

experiences.title: AI Developer
experiences.description: I now specialize in AI industry, building and testing new bots, using these bots to solve problems for the community.

experiences.title: Professional Frontend and Backend Web Developer
experiences.description: I utilized my Covid period efficiently, and leveled up my self, made many websites and published them. Mid 2025, I had built a powerful PC, it was all done by my self, and I still can't believe looking at my PC that I have made this.

experiences.title: After Covid
experiences.description: I learned about HTML and CSS, by this time, I had a great experience about developing websites, and had made over 1000+ websites. By Mid 2021, I received an old laptop but with great specs from my Aunt because my PC's motherboard somehow got shorted.

experiences.title: Got interested in Computers
experiences.description: During this time, I was growing up, and started to finally see the world around me properly, and built an amazing interest in computers, spending time watching on YouTube about different computers and laptops, until I was gifted my very first computer by the end of 2018.
